nasb.text: Only in the cities of these peoples that the Lord your God is giving you as an inheritance, you shall not leave alive anything that breathes.

esv.text: But in the cities of these peoples that the Lord your God is giving you for an inheritance, you shall save alive nothing that breathes,

cnv.text: 只是在耶和華你的　神賜給你作產業的這些國民的城市裡，凡有氣息的，連一個你也不可讓他活著；

ccb.text: 你们的上帝耶和华将把你们附近各族的城邑赐给你们，你们要将里面有气息的全部消灭。
